name: renef
description: Operate renef (renef.io) — the Android ARM64 dynamic-instrumentation engine. Bundles the 'renef' Agent Skill: an operator's manual (syntax contract, self-lint, task playbook) for hooking native & Java functions, scanning/patching memory, tracing syscalls, bypassing SSL pinning / root detection, and porting Frida / GameGuardian scripts to renef Lua 5.4. Works in Claude Code and OpenCode.
